requirement.original: 开始执行全部 (execute all root-cause fixes for git hygiene across all repos)
requirement.clarified: Implement all 8 architect-confirmed git hygiene fixes: fill gitignore gaps in dot-claude (.gitignore) and 6 per-project repos, untrack binary artifact in budget-management via git rm --cached, add Playwright --output-dir config to /root/.claude.json, and create an idempotent SessionStart harness-propagation hook (hooks/session-gitignore-propagate.sh) registered in settings.json.
requirement.what: Multi-repo .gitignore gap fills + git rm --cached for tracked binary + Playwright output-dir config + new harness-propagation SessionStart hook
requirement.why: Prior cycle (20260518-214050) fixed per-repo symptoms but missed the root cause: no unified policy for harness-generated output (tests/generated/, docs/codex/, .playwright-mcp/). Without a propagation mechanism, each new repo integration requires a manual fix. The tracked 329KB HTML artifact in budget-management consumes git history for no benefit.

included: budget-management: *.html rule in .gitignore + git rm --cached asset-tracker.html
excluded: Adding docs/research/ blanket rule to orchestra (would untrack INDEX.md and README.md)
Physical filesystem deletion of HTML files
Any changes to hook logic outside session-gitignore-propagate.sh

success_criteria: git check-ignore tests/generated/foo exits 0 in dot-claude
git ls-files asset-tracker.html in budget-management returns empty
docs/codex/ rule present in travel-planner and multi-asset-portfolio .gitignore
tests/generated/ rule present in travel-planner, knowledge-system-jade, budget-management, feedbackforge .gitignore
hooks/session-gitignore-propagate.sh exists, is executable, exits 0 idempotently
constraints: orchestra docs/research/INDEX.md and README.md must remain tracked
Harness propagation hook must be idempotent (grep-before-append per rule)
No physical deletion of files from filesystem (only git rm --cached)

path_dependent_shared_infra: settings.json (SessionStart hooks configuration — shared hook registry)

out_of_scope_observations.observation: Tracked HTML file inside output/dashboards/; output/ rule in budget-management .gitignore will prevent future files but this tracked file needs git rm --cached. Promoted to Should Have S1 due to size (144KB) and auto-commit origin.
Tracked HTML file inside output/dashboards/; same as asset-tracker.html above. Promoted to Should Have S1.

root_cause_analysis.symptom: Harness-generated directories (tests/generated/, docs/codex/) and binary artifacts (asset-tracker.html) appear as untracked noise or tracked in git across multiple repos; Playwright screenshots land in working tree
root_cause_analysis.root_cause: No unified gitignore policy was established when the harness was deployed across repos. Each repo received an ad-hoc .gitignore that did not include the standard harness output directories. The prior fix cycle (20260518-214050) addressed known-dirty repos individually but: (a) missed several rule-repo combinations, (b) did not prevent future recurrence via a propagation mechanism, and (c) did not address the tracked binary artifact (auto-committed via cron).
root_cause_analysis.root_cause_commit: 89771b3 — Auto-commit: 2026-03-18 09:29:13 (budget-management asset-tracker.html entered index via auto-commit cron before *.html rule was in .gitignore)
root_cause_analysis.why_introduced: Auto-commit cron ran before gitignore policy was defined; harness deployment did not include gitignore template propagation
root_cause_analysis.why_problematic: Tracked binary artifacts inflate git history; untracked harness output creates noise in git status; Playwright screenshots accumulate in working tree without --output-dir isolation
root_cause_analysis.timeline: March 2026: asset-tracker.html auto-committed; May 2026: harness deployed but gitignore propagation not included; May 18: partial fix (8/12 repos); May 25: full fix (remaining gaps + propagation hook)
observations: git ls-files asset-tracker.html in /root/budget-management returns 'asset-tracker.html' (observed: Bash git ls-files)
git status in /root/multi-asset-portfolio shows docs/codex/ content as untracked (observed: Bash git status)
git status in /root/travel-planner shows tests/generated/ and docs/codex/ content as untracked (observed: Bash git status)
git status in /root/orchestra shows docs/research/case-39742/ as untracked (observed: Bash git status)
dot-claude .gitignore has no tests/generated/, docs/codex/, or *.png rules (observed: Read file)
/root/.claude.json playwright args has no --output-dir argument (observed: Read file)
PNG files exist under worktrees/overnight-20260501-d0ec784d/screenshots/ in dot-claude (observed: find)
docs/research/INDEX.md and README.md ARE tracked in orchestra (observed: git ls-files)
root_cause_analysis.localization_evidence: Direct git ls-files, git status, and file system checks in this session confirmed each gap. No inference from comments or prior specs used as primary evidence.
root_cause_analysis.located_source: Multiple .gitignore files (confirmed missing rules via grep and git check-ignore) + /root/budget-management git index (confirmed tracked asset-tracker.html via git ls-files)

attempts.proposed_solution: Add missing .gitignore rules to per-project repos individually
attempts.outcome: 8 repos fixed; multi-asset-portfolio data/*/sentiment-monitor/, budget-management root asset-tracker.html, orchestra docs/research/case-*/, and harness-propagation mechanism all missed

novelty_check.rationale: Prior attempt was L1 (point-in-time rule additions to known-dirty repos). This attempt is L3 (exact rule values + git rm --cached + .claude.json config data) + L5 (infrastructure — new SessionStart hook that prevents future recurrence). The propagation hook eliminates the root cause rather than treating the symptom.

context.codebase_state: dot-claude .gitignore missing 3 harness rules; 6 per-project repos missing 1-3 rules each; budget-management has tracked binary artifact; /root/.claude.json has no playwright output-dir
context.recent_commits: 538bc0f fix(hooks): close compound-injection gap in sentinel grant match (allow-gaps); 9bb61e0 docs(spec): append Cycle 3 continuation block to spec-20260520-221059

development_approach.strategy: Sequential per-repo .gitignore edits (grep-before-append per rule), git rm --cached for tracked artifact, JSON edit for .claude.json, new hook file creation, settings.json registration.
development_approach.validation_approach: For each .gitignore: grep for added rule + git check-ignore on a synthetic path. For budget-management: git ls-files returns empty for asset-tracker.html. For .claude.json: python3 JSON parse + check args array. For hook: run from /root/travel-planner/ with travel-planner .gitignore already having tests/generated/ and assert no duplicate appended + exit 0.

_risk_level_doc: All changes are additive gitignore rules + one git rm --cached + one config arg addition + one new hook script. No logic is removed. Binding constraints prevent regression of !docs/dev/ and !docs/reference/. No user-triggered code paths affected.
score_injection_action: Range 61-80 Senior Craftsman with 3x close_fail_qa_pass(-5) recent events signals accumulated close-phase failures; prioritizing tighter scope boundary documentation and explicit binding-constraint enforcement in ACs to reduce QA rejection risk in the close phase.
